hero.title: I build maintainable web applications with Laravel and React.
hero.description: I focus on software architecture, clean code and thoughtful problem solving to create reliable solutions that are easy to understand and evolve.

mikiwi.title: MiKiWi
mikiwi.description: A Full Stack e-commerce application built with Laravel, React and Inertia.js, focused on product customization, maintainable architecture and relational data modeling.
mikiwi.problem: The project explored how to structure a customizable e-commerce platform without concentrating business logic in controllers or coupling the interface too tightly to the backend.
mikiwi.solution: I designed a modular application with Laravel, React and Inertia.js, separating responsibilities across the application and organizing business concerns using Domain-Driven Design principles.
decisions: Laravel migrations, seeders and Eloquent ORM.
React and Inertia.js for the user interface.
GitHub Actions for basic Continuous Integration.
Redsys as the selected payment gateway.
Supabase as the PostgreSQL database platform.
mikiwi.learning: This project strengthened my understanding of software architecture, relational modeling, API design and the importance of separating business logic from framework concerns.
mikiwi.imageAlt: Animated preview of the MiKiWi project
